svg.title: Animation toolset high-level architecture
svg.desc: Data flow diagram showing a central ComponentRegistry at the core, with SceneManager, RenderingSystem, ControlRigSystem, AnimationRecorderSystem, and AnimationPlaybackSystem all reading and writing component data through it. The ControlWindow reads from SceneManager and the ComponentRegistry. SceneObjects hold only component handles.

g.text: Single owner of ALL component data
